description_long: This is a dual-arm wall sconce lamp featuring two conical, pleated fabric shades that diffuse the light softly. The lamp arms are made of dark metal, elegantly curved and attached to a round, metallic wall mount. The shades are semi-translucent, allowing a warm glow to pass through while obscuring the bulbs inside. The overall design is classic and functional, suitable for both traditional and modern urban interiors or exteriors. The lamp's structure is robust, with visible mounting hardware at the center. Decorative elements include the ribbed texture of the shades and the smooth, glossy finish of the metal arms and base.
description: A dual-arm wall sconce lamp with pleated fabric shades and curved dark metal arms, mounted on a round metallic base. The design is classic, with ribbed shades and a glossy metal finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing both pleated shades, the curved arms, and the round wall mount clearly.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the shades and the curvature of the arms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the round wall mount and the symmetrical arrangement of the arms.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the shades' depth and the mounting hardware.
